name: Portuguese Fried Chicken with Chili Mustard S
recipeIngredient: 1 Roasted Red Pepper, peeled, seeded and chopped
3 cloves Garlic, crushed to a paste
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dry rub: In a food processor, combine the roasted red peppers, garlic, and olive oil. Puree until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Completely coat chicken pieces with the dry rub. Place on a baking sheet and allow to sit for 20 minutes.
3. Evenly coat each piece of chicken with flour. Dip each piece in egg, removing any excess liquid. Return to flour, coating each side well.
4. Fill a skillet with oil at least 2 inches high. When the oil is hot, carefully lay the chicken pieces in the oil. Do not overcrowd the pan.
5. Fry until golden brown, about 8-10 minutes. Turn the chicken over and continue cooking until done.
6. Season with Essence (a dash of salt and pepper). Serve with mustard sauce.
